## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Monograph's content performance, strategy, and next steps with growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive growth: 30% weekly increase, 50% engagement rate, 75 sessions in week 6](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Engineering content performing well, aligning with Monograph's goal to reach more engineering audience](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [New content pipeline in development, aiming to increase output from 5 to 10 pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Reddit strategy outlined, focusing primarily on increasing LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [30% weekly growth rate in sessions](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [50% engagement rate (higher than industry standard)](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [23 different keywords generating sessions](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Engineering content showing promising performance](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Early LLM traffic from various engines, with ChatGPT as the top referrer](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Strategic Content Recommendations

  - [Focus on implementation and technical integration content (e.g., AI in civil engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Develop software evaluation and comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Continue producing engineering-focused content and educational guides](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Expand on high-performing content types (e.g., payment reminder email template)](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

### Content Production Pipeline

  - [Team re-architecting pipelines for improved efficiency and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Aiming to reduce manual editing time from 30 minutes to a few minutes per piece](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Goal to increase content output from 5 to 10 pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### Reddit Strategy

  - [Primary goal: Increase LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Plan to post 2-4 times per week](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Content pillars: Q\&A, practice management, industry data, problem-solution case studies, tools and templates](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Leveraging Monograph's internal data and benchmarks for unique content](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

### Team Changes and Content Review Process

  - [Gary's last week; new demand gen hires coming at the end of the month](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [For September: growthx.ai to publish content without Monograph's review](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [October: New demand gen manager to be assigned to SEO/GEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to continue publishing content through September without Monograph's review](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Monograph to provide benchmark report data for use in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [growthx.ai to develop and implement Reddit content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [New content clusters to be spun up in the next week](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Monograph to review and prioritize content topics in Slack when possible, otherwise growthx.ai will proceed independently](https://fathom.video/share/75G-9tRHdsbVyLxxNsjCngCPc9Pggkw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
